creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
I only found those two:
https://salsa.debian.org/debian/devscripts/-/commit/509007ad420681ba176231ee9a5da96a6e1f0a75
https://salsa.debian.org/debian/devscripts/-/blob/master/debian/changelog

Neither look particularly meaningful. However, the latter at least mentions changes relevant to the port, even if those are buried within quite some noise.
